message:
test(server): add 38 tests for tui_decision and tui_macro modules

- tui_decision (16 new → 30 total): DiffAction index/labels, strategy default,
  compute_likelihood for all frame types, dominant_state, expected_loss,
  zero_change_ratio, alternating_frames_stays_bounded
- tui_macro (22 new → 46 total): stable_hash64 determinism/collision,
  PlaybackState/RecorderState variants, MacroDef empty/serde, playback edge
  cases, action_ids constants, sanitize_filename unicode/empty, rename/stop
  when idle, status_label formats

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
